overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white cape exploring a grassy field at dusk. The character walks past burning patches of grass and circles around a giant turtle bearing a stone mausoleum, with the massive golden Erdtree visible in the background against a purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field with scattered burning patches

events.description: character walks through patches of burning grass emitting orange flames

agents.ego_description: walking away from the turtle structure through tall grass, navigating around burning patches

notable_agents.action: giant turtle with stone bell structure, stationary as character departs

entered.detail: massive golden glowing tree dominating the horizon against purple sky
large gray stone outcrops and boulders scattered across the landscape
patches of orange flames burning in the grass field
ancient stone building ruins partially visible on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a giant turtle structure and walks away through a grassy field at dusk. The massive golden Erdtree glows in the distance against a purple sky, while patches of fire burn in the grass nearby. Rocky cliffs and distant ruins frame the open landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant stone ruins

agents.ego_description: circling left around the hillside to approach the turtle from a different angle

notable_agents.action: giant turtle with mausoleum visible ahead on the left, stationary

entered.detail: tree with golden yellow foliage standing on the grassy hillside

segments.scene_description: The character circles left through the open grassland, leaving the burning patches behind. The giant turtle structure becomes visible ahead on the left, while the Erdtree remains centered in the distance. A yellow autumn tree stands out on the right hillside.

events.description: character passes closely by the giant turtle structure on the left side

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the giant turtle structure closely on the left, continuing along the path

notable_agents.action: giant turtle with stone bell structure, passed closely on the left

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the tall grass
ruined stone arch structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the giant turtle along a dirt path, passing it closely on the left. The Erdtree shifts to the right side of the frame as the character turns, with distant stone ruins and an archway visible ahead. The turtle's detailed stone structure and glowing orange underside are visible as the character passes.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through grassland toward distant ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path away from the turtle, heading toward distant stone structures

entered.detail: large ancient stone ruins directly ahead on the path
scattered boulders and rock formations on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dirt path away from the turtle, with the Erdtree returning to center frame. The path leads toward large stone ruins ahead, with rocky outcrops lining the left side of the trail. The landscape remains open and grassy under the purple dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grassy field at dusk that begins near a colossal creature and eventually leads toward distant stone ruins. It begins with the character walking away from a giant turtle structure, passing burning patches of grass while the golden Erdtree glows against a purple sky. As the character circles left through the open grassland, the burning patches fade behind them and a yellow autumn tree appears on a nearby hillside. The scene then shifts as the character follows a dirt path to pass closely by the turtle, revealing its glowing orange underside and detailed stone shell before the Erdtree slides to the right of the frame. Finally, the camera moves away from the creature and back toward the center of the landscape, following the trail past rocky outcrops toward large stone ruins under the darkening sky.
